All the old order changeth, and
one of the vital problems of this
changing order is the Woman
Question"


Because of lack of knowledge
and understanding many men and,
strange to say, as many women,
would settle it by referring women
to her Natural Calling which, be-
ing interpreted, means housekeep
ing, breeding and rearing of chill
dren. These comfortable stupid
persons, asleep in the midst of the
march of events, have no intelli'
gent conception of the economic
forces which are revolutionizing So
ciety.


INVADING WOMAN'S SPHERE.


When Hargrave produced his
Spinning Jenny" back in 1910, the
invasion of "Women's Sphere" be-
gan. and modern industry has kept
on invading it ever since. 1t has
taken the baking, the brewing, the
weaving and sewing out. of the
home, and who shall demur when
woman follows her so-called ''voca-
ton? With the modern processes
of production the primitive home
must go. Cling to the old customs,
draw them back if you can, you
unprogressive human beings, but
evolutionary forces, modern bust
ness enterprise" is at work and
you are only pawns in the game
of economic progress.


MUST BECOME INDEPENDENT.


Woman suffers during this transit
ton period from two vital causes
social and economic dependence.
To some small extent the situation
may become mitigated, perhaps,
when she is given equality before
the law, granted suffrage, but there
can be no final solution until she
is relieved of the humiliation of
being economically dependent upon
man.


STUDY SOCIAL PROBLEM.


In the last analysis woman's
emancipation can never be accom-
plished until the whole social prop
lem is solved. until man himself is
no longer a slave of man. The
woman who hopes. through gaining
the ballot. to find solution of the
woman Question" certainty has
